theScene: You step through the dim tunnel passage out into the hustle and bustle of the city's commercial district, the quiet darkness giving way to glimmering spires of steel and spiderwebs of alleyways filled with crowds of monster girls going about their day or hurrying to and fro.
Looking around, you also spot a human here and there among the throngs of city-dwellers, most of them walking alongside one or several monster girls, looking quite acclimated to the place...

After a moment of getting your bearings amid the dizzying ebb and flow of the moving crowd, you get a chance to properly take in all the sights and locales available for your perusal in the busy shopping crossing.
Travel to the Starlight District. (Advances Time)
Go into the nearby alleyways. (Advances Time every 2 uses)
Go to the Capital Entrance Kiosk.

EventText.NameOfScene: Go to the Capital Entrance Kiosk.
theScene: Stepping out of the busy streets, you make your way back into the calm darkness of the entrance tunnel, soon returning to the information kiosk and the way back out of Ars Delusia.
You make your way out of the Capital and return to Town.

EventText.NameOfScene: Go into the nearby alleyways. (Advances Time every 2 uses)
Travel to the Starlight District. (Advances Time)

theScene: Feeling a bit tired or peckish, you look around for a place to eat within the busy Eros District Crossing, and have no trouble finding a myriad of restaurants and eateries of all kinds scattered about, a few particularly unique or popular ones catching your notice.
Before you head to your intended destination, you realize you're lacking the money to actually afford it, thankfully sparing you an embarrassing moment...

You walk over to the conspicuous set of boxy 'lockers' uniformly set up against a nearby building, each bearing colorful signage and slogans, and sporting a glass-covered front letting you see the wares available for purchase within.

With a quick glance, you can see that most of the machines seem to dispense snacks and drinks exclusively, but one of the larger and flashier ones seems to serve food instead, and features a chipped picture of an ecstatic imp holding a bowl of noodles instead of a glass front. You also spot a small notice underneath the large buttons that make up its menu, and which reads: {i}'I.M.P.' has no affiliation with 'Impeccable Taste'.{/i}

Choosing not to wonder what the story behind this disclaimer might be, you redirect your attention to the available meals and follow the written instructions, sliding Eros into a slot before pushing the button matching your chosen dish. Immediately, the press of your finger is answered by a noisy 'KA-CHUNK', a few whirring sounds, a sizzling noise, and finally a conclusive beep as a silvery package slips out of a slot at the bottom.

Gingerly taking your order, you move to one of the nearby tables to sit down and unwrap your order... and cannot help but notice that its appearance isn't {i}quite{/i} as appealing as the machine's colorful display boasted. Suspiciously, you poke at the steaming food using the flimsy fork provided with it, but ultimately shrug and get to chowing down, surrounded by the people passing by and the buzzing chatter of their conversations.

Before you know it, you've finished your hot meal, and mulling it over, you can't say it was particularly bad, or particularly good... It was certainly food, at least. Quick and cheap food, at that. At least, you now feel rested and ready to get back to exploring more of Ars Delusia!

Curiously, you approach the restaurant sporting a large glowing sign featuring the face of a happy mountain harpy eating a slice of pizza. Stepping inside, you find the store to be bustling with quite the activity, and see that the establishment appears to be split between an order counter and a dining area.

As you move on to join the queue, you see that the employees seem to consist of a mixed team of energetic harpies and imps, the monster girls blitzing back and forth and exchanging shouted instructions as they industriously prep pizzas or take freshly baked ones out of ovens, the feathered women using their mouths or talons to wield utensils and baking trays while the handy horned girls manage the more finesse-oriented tasks.

With how swiftly they are working, waiting in line doesn't take too long, leaving you rather admirative of how they can manage to coordinate so efficiently and avoid colliding into each other, given how many of them there are back there, moving with scurrying steps and flapping wings.

Looking over the menu, rather than buy an entire pizza for yourself, you decide to order only a few slices with different toppings along with a drink, which gets you your food almost immediately, one imp taking them from under a nearby heating lamp display and deftly wrapping them before passing them to a smiling harpy who uses the edges of her wings to hand you the packaged slices with a cheerful 'Thank you for your order!'.

This leaves you to get out of the seemingly endless line to settle at one of the tables and enjoy your nearly fresh-from-the-oven pizza with unexpected relish. Despite the fast-paced cooking and the somewhat impersonal nature of the service, you cannot but admit that the restaurant clearly puts a lot of effort into the quality of its food.

As you finish munching on your last slice, and ponder how this place came to be, you idly notice a more remote area further back which seems to offer more refined seating for parties, large groups, and private dining, though your thoughts are interrupted by a noisy crash whose cause immediately becomes apparent from a series of panicked squawks and swears.

But as you worriedly peek over, you can see that the kitchen staff seems to already be on top of it, albeit clearly peeved at the mishap of a bowl of dough getting flung across the kitchen, leaving you wondering how often incidents like this happen here...

As for you, after swallowing your last remaining bite, you sigh contently, feeling surprisingly re-energized and ready to move back out into the bustling Ars Delusian streets! As you free your table, you see it get almost immediately cleaned by a swooping harpy with a rag in her talons, the merry monster girl giving you a lively farewell wave with her wing on your way out... and nearly face-planting into the table in the process...

As your stomach digests the pizza meal you just partook of, you can feel a flair for business begin to permeate your being... though you could just as well shake it off, especially if you're already under the effect of another special food whose benefits you wouldn't want to lose.

Following Heather's directions, you find out that she wasn't kidding about the place being 'almost literally a hole in the wall', the 'shop' seeming to consist solely of a small window covered by nondescript weathered curtains, not even featuring a door or any other kind of entrance that you can see. If it weren't for the small waiting line of customers leaving one after the other with ice cream cones, you might have missed it entirely...

Joining the queue, you only need to cool your heels for a few minutes before your turn comes, the service at least seeming to be quite expedient. And while you wait, you notice that payment seems to be performed via a small chute, while the ice creams are deftly slipped through the curtains and placed on a horizontal ring for customers to pick up in return, seemingly without any actual interaction ever taking place.

In addition, you catch sight of a placard glued next to the curtains and visibly intended for the clientele, which reads as follows:
{b}Today's ice cream: 800 Eros
No custom orders.
Thanks appreciated, but {u}don't try and talk to me{/u}, and {u}don't try and open the curtains{/u}.{/b}
... It seems like Heather wasn't kidding about 'the owner's quirks' either...
Regardless, when your turn comes, you do as instructed and drop 800 Eros into the chute, leaving your money to disappear with nary a tinkle.

Scarcely half a minute later, your order comes, passing through the curtains so fast that you are unable to get even just a glimpse of what lies beyond them, but leaving you with your sought-after delicacy which you pick up before quickly walking off to make way for the next customer.

At least, you are pleased to see that the mysterious proprietor doesn't skimp on quantity, your sweet treat being almost as tall as your head, and consisting of a large, nicely crisp cone that somehow feels warm in your hand, topped by a fist-sized mound of downright snowy-looking ice cream.
Curious as to the taste, you take a lick... and blink as your tongue is immediately assailed with fruity freshness that sends your tastebuds singing!

With your appetite and sweet tooth suddenly stoked, you lap, slurp, and suck at the confection with gusto, delighting in the wonderfully light, creamy taste of the frozen dish, then in the fulfilling, waffle-like toastiness of its cone, the whole yummy treat looking to have been made on the spot straight before you picked it up, and always leaving you coming back for more...

Before you've realized it, you're tossing the last of your cone into your mouth, and as it crunches between your teeth, you sigh in deep satisfaction at the splendid experience... but also in regret that it was all over so quickly, feeling nevertheless absolutely content about your purchase as you carry on with your day.

As your stomach digests the ice cream you just partook of, you can feel cool, zen-like serenity begin to permeate your being... though you could just as well shake it off, especially if you're already under the effect of another special food whose benefits you wouldn't want to lose.
Accept the unnamed ice cream parlor's food perk.

EventText.NameOfScene: Accept the unnamed ice cream parlor's food perk.

theScene: You move over to the nearby curry restaurant, which is clearly popular to the point of famous judging by how crowded the inside is with customers, as you can see at a mere glance. Curiously looking up at the outdoors signage as you get ready to join the extensive waiting line, you can't help but smile as you're met with the cheerful sight of a pair of cutesy cat faces presenting a bowl of curry and rice...

... only for your joy to vanish when you find the queue stretching all the way into an alleyway where customers-to-be are happily chatting about the food they're about to partake of, or trading idle gossip, or exchanging lovers' talk, each group killing time in its own way. Baffled, you keep following the line and see it stretch on further still, twisting and coiling down another street, and then another... then {i}even further back...{/i}

You quickly realize that it would take more than the entire rest of the day to {i}finally{/i} get in if you joined in at this point!!! No matter how good the food is, it can't be {u}that{/u} good... right?
Shaking your head, you step away, yet you can't help but feel curious... Perhaps if you came back at a less busy time of the day, there might be a way to get a spot...?

Approaching the popular curry restaurant whose colorful signage features a pair of cutesy cat faces presenting a bowl of curry and rice, you find only a scant few people walking in and out at this late hour, leaving you free to head inside where you are instantly embraced by the powerful spicy scent of curry permeating the homey restaurant, the hot kick leaving you a bit dizzy... but all the hungrier!

The seating apparently being at the customer's discretion, you settle into an empty booth and pick up a menu, only to see a single option emblazoned boldly upon the pamphlet along with a picture of a grinning cat doing a V sign: '{i}Gran-Cat's Ultra Spicy Nyantastic Catastrophe Curry! - Guaranteed to boost vigor and then some!♪{/i}'

As you put down the menu with some perplexity, you look up to find a humming, hunched-over, doddering elderly cat woman matter-of-factly setting a heaping bowl of rice and curry upon your table, the aged monster girl giving you a warm smile, then patting your shoulder with a nod in a sly, wordless 'good luck' gesture before slowly making her way back to the kitchen to fetch another person's order.

Tentatively, you stare down at the meal before you, and can smell the {i}sheer heat{/i} contained within the dish, the spicy sensory aggression sending a shiver of concern through your body... Is this even safe for consumption?

Looking worriedly to the other customers, monsters and humans alike, you see that some seem to be handling it well, while others are bent over their table in obvious spice-induced agony... But then get right back to eating, shoveling in another mouthful with a happy noise!?

Despite your lingering doubts, your curiosity and spirit of discovery get the better of you, and you dig into the curry without further ado. After all, you're a seasoned adventurer. Some spicy food can't be that-

You freeze as you are immediately hit by a delicious medley of different flavors and spices while a stark {i}searing{/i} heat washes through your entire mouth, making you feel like an army of tiny fire elementals have taken up residence in your tastebuds... {i}But it tastes so good.{/i}

Thus begins the great battle for your very life against the delicious curry.
You find yourself chipping through the meal over you don't know how long, as if in a trance, swallowing mouthful after mouthful in-between generous refills of rice and water readily provided by Gran-Cat along with half-unintelligible words of encouragement.

Perhaps you blacked out at some point, or maybe you were hungrier than you realized, but before you've noticed it, you've entirely polished off your bowl... and your whole body is drenched in sweat like you've just endured a scorcher while your mouth feels as if it's on fire. Delicious fire.

In a daze, you get up and pay the bill set down on your table by the old woman who snickers in playful feline amusement at your state, but nods in downright solemn approval at your healthy appetite, then waggles her bushy eyebrows with a knowing 'Good job, kit. You'll hit it big with the ladies soon.'.
Then she moves on to another customer in her seemingly endless march to serve her deathly delicious curry...

As for you, staggering out of the restaurant along with a few other equally dizzy patrons, you squint into the sun's rising rays creeping over the Ars Delusian buildings, wondering how long you were in there, the burn of the nyantastic curry still tinging your senses... And yet, despite the sensation of spicy bleariness and the lack of proper sleep, you feel rather invigorated!... And maybe a little hornier than usual...

As your stomach digests the spicy meal you just partook of, you can feel pawsitively cat-astrophic magic begin to permeate your being... though you could just as well shake it off, especially if you're already under the effect of another special food whose benefits you wouldn't want to lose.
Accept Curry and Catastrophe's food perk.

EventText.NameOfScene: Accept Curry and Catastrophe's food perk.

theScene: The feeling quickly subsides, leaving you with just a pleasant sensation of satiety.

Stepping towards the colorfully advertised all-you-can-eat restaurant, you note that its decor and styling are quite reminiscent of the architecture of the Will-Power Temple's kunoichi dojo, right down to the tatamis, sliding doors, and folding screens. Upon entering, you somehow find a similar atmosphere of reverence and solemnity, the inside giving a feeling of tranquil ambience, even filled with people as it is.

Promptly, you're welcomed by a succubus in full kunoichi trainee garb who greets you with a smile and a bow, not-so-inadvertently flaunting her cleavage in the process before she guides you to a free table, her wide hips swaying as she walks and talks, cheerfully explaining how ordering at the restaurant works. She also mentions that all the employees here are actually dropouts from Shizu's training who couldn't make the cut.

With a proud chuckle at the joke, she leaves you with a menu before deftly poofing away in a cloud of smoke to take another customer's order, leaving you to browse the many different exotic dishes available as part of the all-you-can-eat foray, the restaurant boasting that they source their eggs from Harpy Village, their rice from 'virile human farmers'... and their fish from Sleim Vllge?

With a proud chuckle at the joke, she leaves you with a menu before deftly poofing away in a cloud of smoke to take another customer's order, leaving you to browse the many different exotic dishes available as part of the all-you-can-eat foray, the restaurant boasting that they source their eggs from Harpy Village and their rice from 'virile human farmers'.

Once you have finished making your choices and put down the menu to signal you are ready to order, nary a few seconds pass before the same ninja waitress appears in another puff of smoke to serve your dishes, as though you had been spied on the entire time, the kunoichi's slow and careful movements as she fills your table giving you clearly deliberate extra opportunities to appreciate her curvy form.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of matcha ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of mango ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of chocolate ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of blueberry ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of cherry ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

With a playful wink, she vanishes to leave you to enjoy your feast of sushi and other dishes, and you eat until you're more than full, having underestimated how filling rice can be... You can't help but feel like this is a place better suited to groups than lone dining, but you manage to just fit in a temptingly fragrant serving of red bean ice cream for dessert before getting up to pay your tab.

On your way out of the bustling restaurant, you're given a giddy goodbye wave by your server, the seductive succubus encouraging you to come again with a sultry wiggle of her barely covered hips that sticks to your mind as you return into the busy streets of Ars Delusia.

As your stomach digests the sushi meal you just partook of, you can feel sneaky kunoichi magic begin to permeate your being... though you could just as well shake it off, especially if you're already under the effect of another special food whose benefits you wouldn't want to lose.

Stepping over to the strikingly gothic, spooky-looking restaurant, you see that you're arriving just as another group is leaving, the satisfied-looking customers getting waved off cheerfully by a ghost casually transposing through one of the walls of the windowless diner.

As soon as she notices you, the apparition-like monster girl welcomes your approach with what is probably meant to sound like a sinister cackle but comes across as more of a joyful giggle... before reaching out and playfully yanking you inside!

In a dizzying flurry of activity, you're spirited away to a table and pushed into a chair by the overeager waitering ghost who happily leaves you with a menu and a moment to breathe, allowing you to take in the cartoonishly tomb-like interior of the... pub?, the haunted house atmosphere accented by a trio of ghostly waitresses briskly darting about, taking orders, conveying them to the kitchen, and ferrying dishes back and forth.

Looking around, you can see that despite the restaurant's otherworldly theme, the mood seems quite jolly and relaxed, a mixed clientele of humans and monster girls of all ages enthusiastically interacting with the energetic staff, a few of them even using photographic devices to take their pictures with the ghostly employees who gladly pose and grimace next to the giddy patrons.

However, you don't get much time to yourself, your server promptly returning with water for you, setting it on the table as she puts on a spooky accent to ask for your '{b}{i}orrrderrrrr{/b}{/i}', before giggling in personal amusement. You quickly glance back to the menu to settle on something, only hesitating a moment before deciding, the phantom waitress happily jotting your order down on a notepad before floating off to the kitchen.

Before long, another of the ghostly servers comes your way, carrying aloft a large covered plate that she ceremoniously sets down upon your table before overdramatically lifting the cloche, deliciously steamy spectral air wafting out of the unveiled meal enticingly, the showy reveal letting you appreciate the ghoulishly cute decor arranged around and on the food, like a 'horrific' spectacle emerging from a ghastly mist.

With an ominous giggle, the ethereal woman floats off to take care of another customer, leaving you to '{b}{i}enjoyyy your fooOOOoood~{/b}{/i}'. The gothy ectoplasmic accents certainly add a whole kind of charm to the dish, making it a feast for the eyes as well as for the palate, as you find out when you tuck into your food with gusto, greatly appreciating the 'to die for' quality of the oversized portion you have been served.

After a long feast, you finish your meal with, to your surprise, nary any leftovers, upon which a proudly smiling ghost floats over to hand you a small tombstone-shaped clipboard with your bill, whereupon you sign your financial losses, handing over both tip and payment before making your way out of the dark cloistered den of grilled bar fare, back to the freedom of the Ars Delusian streets' constant hustle and bustle.

As your stomach digests the opulent meal you just partook of, you can feel spectral magic begin to permeate your being... though you could just as well shake it off, especially if you're already under the effect of another special food whose benefits you wouldn't want to lose.
The feeling quickly subsides, leaving you with just a pleasant sensation of satiety.

You go check out the myriad of shops in the district, and find out that a large number of them cater solely to monster girls... or at the very least, that they are not carrying adventuring-capable gear based on their adverts. Still, a few pique your interests, looking like their wares would be more relevant to your purposes.

A large pink, heart-decorated boutique called {i}Impeccable Taste{/i} seems to offer a variety of fashionable clothes.
{i}Arch-Light Delights{/i} looks to be a very high-end fancy store for a wealthy clientele.
Finally, down a dingy, dark alleyway is a brightly, messily painted shop, adorned in stark blacks and garish electric hues, called {i}Graffiti Queen{/i}.

As you approach the silvery building, the entrance's glass doors smoothly slide open on their own, letting you step into the posh glimmering interior, racks of clothing and accessories filling the rather calm and quiet shop, an almost solemn air of ceremony pervading the place as luxuriously-dressed customers critically inspect wares or exchange hushed conversations with attentive employees.

But before you can begin browsing in earnest yourself, you're swiftly approached by a smiling, seductively-dressed shopping attendant succubus who gives you a smiling wink as she sashays closer to you, her barely constrained bust bouncing against her chic glimmery clothing with every step.
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Wink|n|Hi! Welcome back to Arch-Light Delights, handsome.♥ How can I help you today?♪
Hi! Welcome back to Arch-Light Delights.~ How can I help you today?
Hi there! Welcome to Arch-Light Delights, handsome.~ How can we help you today?

Her charming expression gives way to one of idle inquisitiveness as she scans you up and down with a practiced eye while thoughtfully tapping her index on her cheek, her examination concluding with a curious look at your face.

Hmm... I'm reasonably sure I've never seen you here... You must be new to the Capital, right? I should warn you: this is one of the most select stores in the entire city, so don't be {i}too{/i} shocked if you can't afford anything.

Our wares are top-quality: we only use the best materials, and employ the most talented and trained of tailors, jewelers, and enchanters, so you can at least rest assured that you'll be getting your money's worth. Even Demon Queens have graced us with their patronage.♪
Very well, let's take a look around and see what would fit you.♪
Just try not to spend the entire time staring at me instead of the merchandise.♥
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Seductive|n|Was I the only thing that caught your eye today?♥
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|SmileWink|n|Nothing catch your eye? Don't worry, I window shop all the time myself.♪
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Seductive|n|I told you this place was out of your price range.~
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Wink|n|Well, no worries, a loyal patron like you is welcome to come and stay as much as he wants.♪

|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|SmileUmu|n|But don't worry, you're welcome to come back once you've saved up. We offer some of the best products out there, so once you've made it big, be sure to go and treat yourself.♥
I-It might not be my place to ask, but sh-should you really be spending {i}this{/i} much-?
Oh, who am I kidding? I'm sure you can afford it. You've gotta be {i}loaded!!!{/i}

Her overexcited outburst is accompanied by the energetic swaying of her tail behind her, and by the chiding glares of a number of patrons and employees for noisily spoiling the serene atmosphere, promptly prompting her to clear her throat with a brief flush of embarrassment as she quickly recomposes herself.

Straightening up, she puts on her most winsome face as she straightens up, then bows deferentially to you with a picture-perfect smile, the movement coincidentally causing her barely constrained bust to press together into an alluring valley of cleavage.
What I mean is... Thank you for your purchases.♥ And as always, please let me know if I can help you with anything else, handsome.♥
A-Are you just buying stuff for FUN now or something---?

She mutters in an intensely low voice that comically contrasts with her gobsmacked expression, the shopping attendant clearly watching out not to repeat her prior outburst, her expression eventually shifting back into a more carefree one as she gives you a sly smile and a happy flick of her tail.
Well, whatever your reasons and purposes, sir, thank you for your patronage.♥ And please let me know if I can help you with anything else.♥
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|LipLick|n|Thank you for your purchase, esteemed customer.♪ Do not hesitate to let me know if I can help you with anything else.♥
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Seductive|n|Thank you for your purchase, valued customer.♪
Guess I was wrong about you not being able to afford anything.♥ My apologies for that.♪
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Wink|n|With pleasure, esteemed customer.♪ Ask me anything you want to know.♥
|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|SmileWink|n|Of course, valued customer.♪ Ask me anything you want to know.♪
Don't be afraid to ask me if you have any questions about our products, sir.♪
I'm listening. Do you want to know more about our wonderful products?♪
How is anyone supposed to afford this stuff???
Done talking with the Arch-Light attendant.

EventText.NameOfScene: Done talking with the Arch-Light attendant.

theScene: The succubus smiles and clears her throat before going into what sounds like a well-practiced speech, though an edge of genuine excitement in her voice belies any rehearsed monotony.

Arch-Light Delights is a high-end fashion establishment created by the wealthy, for the wealthy... as well as for anyone of lesser means simply wanting to splurge on treating themselves to a taste of well-to-do opulence.♪

Our wares range from state-of-the-art runes, haute couture for men such as tuxedos, luxurious and seductive attires for women up to and including wedding dresses, all the way to a myriad of accessories and assorted adornments. Our tail, wing, and horn accessories are especially popular, and include some of our most affordable items in stock, for the pleasure of any fashionable succubus.

She stresses that last statement with a proud flap of her bat-like wings and a playful flick of her spaded tail, the exquisitely crafted ornaments glittering alluringly in the boutique's suffuse light, their owner treating you to an equally elegant and dazzling wink before continuing.

And to preemptively answer a question that you may have been asking yourself: yes, owing to the high-grade materials our artisans use, many of our wares are {i}quite{/i} suitable for your adventuring needs, even if only to spice up your daring escapades, or simply to look {i}your best{/i} in the process.

As she speaks, she steps just a little bit closer to you while waving proudly to the rows upon rows of extraordinarily posh wares, the sight of such lavishness along with a tantalizing whiff of the succubus' refined perfume leaving you feeling ever-so-slightly dizzy as she continues with lascivious polished professionalism.

And to conclude, for your information, I will add that due to our trade agreements, patented enchantments, and {i}exclusive{/i} employment of the very best professionals Lucidia has to offer, the {i}only{/i} way to acquire Arch-Light goods is to buy them at this very store.♥
So keep us in mind for all your luxury fashion needs, dear customer.♪
She gives you one last, enticing wink before concluding her explanation with a prim half-bow then stepping back, letting you think about what to ask next.

She asks while using a thumb to fiddle with one of the gilded straps on her dress, the minute motion making her plentiful bust jiggle seductively while the shimmering dress sparkles captivatingly, before letting her hand slide back down along her barely concealed curves, the gesture drawing your gaze to the allure of both her flawless skin and pristine garment.

{i}This{/i} is from Arch-Light's line of more {i}risque{/i} outfits, for monster girls looking to entice, please, or seduce their partner.♪ Like all our products, it is layered with enchantments of the highest quality and reliability, for the purpose of either amplifying or suppressing one's allure... And as I am currently on the job, it is set to 'suppress'.

She smiles with a hint of smugness at this revelation, her current attractiveness letting you ponder what her presence would be like fully unhindered, the idea making a slight jolt of arousing curiosity run through your mind while she goes on.

But of course, this is but a sample of the fabulous range of Arch-Light products. We have all kinds of regal dresses available for purchase, as well as outfits of the more 'prim and proper' or 'casual' variety. In fact, I would go as far as to say the latter form our primary market.

After all, bikinis, pasties, or perish the thought, nudity is {i}passé{/i}, and while any monster girl can look sexually appealing, it takes a woman of wealth and taste to pull off the kind of easy elegance that truly attracts gazes and sticks to the mind.♪
But with that said, while this dress arguably on the more skimpy side, it is my {i}favorite{/i}.♪ I absolutely adore the sleek curve-hugging shape and eye-attracting color coordination.♪

She gushes momentarily, her many gilded adornments jingling lightly as she strikes a diva-like pose, before deftly recomposing herself with a prim smile, immediately back to the perfect picture of an attentive attendant.
And that about covers it. Thank you for your interest, dear customer, and do let me know if you have any other questions.

My apologies, sir, but discussing topics unrelated to work is against store policy. If you have questions about our beautiful city, I would encourage you to instead take them to an information kiosk, where your inquiries will be readily and competently answered.
She half-bows in formal apology, then swiftly recovers her approachable smile as she straightens back up.
However, if you have any questions about Arch-Light Delights, I will be happy to answer them.
